cookie.title: Cookies & data processing
cookie.desc: I use analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to track visits. The contact form is processed via Cloudflare Workers. I never sell or share data with third parties. <0>Privacy policy</0>

home.seo_title: Vojtěch Adam | Web design, development and photography Prague
home.seo_desc: Vojtěch Adam — developer, web designer and photographer based in Prague. Custom websites, mobile apps and professional photography.
home.hero_desc: Developer, photographer and web creator based in Prague. I enjoy finance, drone flying and photography.
home.section_projects_desc: Take a look at what I'm working on and what I've built.
home.section_photography_desc: Photography and drones — my passion away from the keyboard.
home.section_webdesign_desc: I build custom websites at fair prices.
home.webfeature_design_desc: Clean, structured visual design tailored to your brand. No templates — every site is built from scratch.
home.webfeature_responsive_desc: Perfect rendering on mobile, tablet and desktop. Fast loading and smooth operation on every device.
home.webfeature_security_desc: SSL certificate, bot & injection protection, secure forms. Your site and customer data stay safe.
home.webfeature_maintenance_desc: Hosting, updates, backups, uptime monitoring — I handle everything. You focus on your business.

about.seo_title: About me | Vojtěch Adam — developer, web designer, photographer
about.seo_desc: I'm Vojtěch Adam — a developer, web designer and photographer based in Prague. I work with React, TypeScript and Python. I shoot on Canon EOS 200D and fly a DJI Mini 4 Pro.
about.title: About me
about.bio: My name is Vojtěch Adam, I'm {{age}} years old, originally from Opava and currently living in Prague (Vršovice). I enjoy finance, drone flying and photography. I work with React, TypeScript, Python and HTML/CSS. In my free time I take photos and contribute to Adobe Stock.

2020.title: First steps in programming
2020.desc: Started learning HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Built my first website.

2021.title: Fast Coupons — first Android app
2021.desc: Built my first Android app in Kotlin — a McDonald's coupon tracker.

2022.title: JustInTime and photography
2022.desc: Launched the JustInTime app and started taking photography more seriously.

2023.title: Custom web projects
2023.desc: Started building websites for clients — including Šlapni k nám and MSSOZ.

2024.title: DJI Mini 4 Pro and Adobe Stock
2024.desc: Got a DJI Mini 4 Pro drone and started contributing to Adobe Stock.

2025.title: New website and more projects
2025.desc: Rebuilt my personal website in React. Working on more client projects.

development.label: Development
development.title: Mobile & web apps
development.desc: I build native mobile apps for Android (Kotlin) and iOS (Swift), and web apps in React and TypeScript. I enjoy solving real problems and creating things people actually want to use.

websites.label: Websites
websites.title: Custom websites from scratch
websites.desc: Every website I build from scratch — no templates, no compromises. Modern design, responsive layout, fast loading. I handle hosting, security and ongoing maintenance.

photography.label: Photography
photography.title: Portraits, landscape & reportage
photography.desc: I shoot with a Canon EOS 200D — portraits, sports reportage, landscapes. My photos have been published in media and used on school materials. Some are sold via Adobe Stock.

drone.label: Drone
drone.title: Aerial photography & video
drone.desc: I fly a DJI Mini 4 Pro for aerial shots for clients and personal projects. My drone footage was used in CNN Prima News coverage of the 2024 Krnov floods.

projects.seo_desc: An overview of Vojtěch Adam's projects — custom websites, Android/iOS apps, open-source tools and photography projects.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: An overview of what I'm working on or have worked on.
projects.section_desc_personal: Projects for personal use, clients or just for fun — not all are public.

fotografie.name: Photography & Drone
fotografie.short_desc: Portrait and landscape photography, aerial footage with DJI Mini 4 Pro.
fotografie.desc: I shoot portrait, street and landscape photography. I fly a DJI Mini 4 Pro drone and capture aerial footage of landscapes, cities and events. Photos on Instagram and for sale on Adobe Stock.

weby-na-zakazku.name: Web development
weby-na-zakazku.short_desc: Custom websites — design, development, hosting, maintenance and security.
weby-na-zakazku.desc: I build modern responsive websites from design through coding to hosting, security and ongoing maintenance. Worked for financial advisors, non-profits and local businesses.

slapniknam.name: Šlapni k nám
slapniknam.short_desc: Financial advisory project — co-founder, website and marketing.
slapniknam.desc: Šlapni k nám is a comprehensive financial advisory project I co-founded with Julie Hořínková. We cover insurance, investments, savings, mortgages and loans. Beyond co-founding, I built the entire website and handle online marketing including Instagram reels management.

justintime.name: JustInTime
justintime.short_desc: Mobile app for route planning so you never arrive late.
justintime.desc: JustInTime is an Android app that tells you when to leave to arrive on time. Originally built for personal use, now with 500+ downloads on Google Play.

fastcoupons.name: Fast Coupons
fastcoupons.short_desc: McDonald's & KFC coupons in one Android app.
fastcoupons.desc: Fast Coupons aggregated available McDonald's and KFC coupons in one place. The app is still downloadable but active coupons are no longer available.

raspberry-pi-dashboard.name: Raspberry Pi Dashboard
raspberry-pi-dashboard.short_desc: Web dashboard for real-time home server monitoring.
raspberry-pi-dashboard.desc: Raspberry Pi dashboard showing CPU temperature, RAM usage, network traffic, UPS status and other real-time metrics. Includes access to a Jellyfin media server.

rolety.name: Blind Control
rolety.short_desc: Blind scheduling app for parents — auto-raise and lower on a timetable.
rolety.desc: Simple web app with scheduling for automatic blind control. Separate settings for weekdays and weekends, authentication and the ability to disable the schedule.

bettermusic.name: BetterMusic
bettermusic.short_desc: iOS and Android app for managing and playing offline downloaded tracks.
bettermusic.desc: BetterMusic automatically downloaded tracks from a selected YouTube playlist for offline listening. Written in Flutter (Dart) for both Android and iOS. Originally built as a personal project and to learn Flutter.

customocto.name: CustomOcto
customocto.short_desc: Custom OctoEverywhere replacement for remote OctoPrint access via Firebase.
customocto.desc: CustomOcto was an alternative to the paid OctoEverywhere service — enabling remote access to a 3D printer via OctoPrint using Firebase Realtime Database as a proxy.

reelpanel.name: ReelPanel
reelpanel.short_desc: Kanban tool for planning and post-production of Instagram reels.
reelpanel.desc: Internal tool for Šlapni k nám — Kanban board for managing reels from idea through filming to publication. 7-phase workflow, 20-point post-production checklist, Google Docs and NAS integration. Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi 4, built on FastAPI + SQLite.

survival-games-leaderboard.name: survival-games.cz Leaderboard
survival-games-leaderboard.short_desc: Leaderboard system for a Minecraft server with player statistics.
survival-games-leaderboard.desc: Web leaderboard for the survival-games.cz Minecraft server displaying player statistics across all minigames — BedWars, EggWars, Skywars, Survival Games and more. Node.js backend connected to the server API.

webfactory.name: WebFactory
webfactory.short_desc: CRM and dashboard for managing clients and web development pipeline.
webfactory.desc: Internal tool for managing clients in custom web development — tracking pipeline (New → Contacted → Interested → In production → Sold), client website notes and contact management.

photography.seo_title: Photographer Prague | Vojtěch Adam — professional photography and drones
photography.seo_desc: Professional photographer based in Prague. Portrait, landscape and reportage photography. Aerial shots with DJI Mini 4 Pro. Canon EOS 200D. Photos on Adobe Stock and Instagram.
photography.subtitle: My work with a camera and drone. More photos on Instagram or Adobe Stock.
photography.hero_title: I see the world<0>through a lens.</0>

photos.sport-florbal-1: Floorball player in action — Bruises Stonava
photos.portrait-car-castle: Car portrait — VW Scirocco by a castle

cnn.title: Drone footage during floods in Krnov
cnn.desc: During the September 2024 floods in Krnov I captured aerial drone footage that was used in a CNN Prima News news report.

school_notebooks.title: Photos on school notebooks
school_notebooks.desc: My photographs were used on the covers of school notebooks published by the Business Academy and Logistics School in Opava.

bruntalsky_info.title: Photography in an article about Business Academy Opava
bruntalsky_info.desc: Issue 9/2024 of Bruntálský Info featured an article about the Business Academy and Logistics School Opava. The left photo was shot during an open-day photoshoot.

dance_up.title: Dance UP Christmas Show
dance_up.desc: Issue 1/2025 featured an article about the Dance UP dance group Christmas show. More photos on my Instagram and Dance Up's Instagram.

webdesign.seo_title: Custom web design Prague | Vojtěch Adam
webdesign.seo_desc: Professional custom web design in Prague. Modern design, fast React websites. Pricing far below agencies. Hosting, maintenance and security included.
webdesign.subtitle: I design and build websites — from design through coding to management, hosting and security.
webdesign.price_note: Pricing is individual and significantly lower than agencies — because I do it with passion, not as a full-time job. Message me and we'll figure it out.

consultation.label: Discovery
consultation.title: We start with a conversation
consultation.desc: We talk through what you need — what kind of site, who it's for, what it should do. No commitment, completely free. That gives us a clear plan and a realistic quote.

design.label: Design
design.title: Custom design, not a template
design.desc: Every site is designed from scratch specifically for you and your brand. Clean visuals, clear navigation, right typography. You see a preview before it goes live.

development.label: Development
development.title: Modern tech, fast result
development.desc: I build with modern tech (React, Next.js or clean HTML/CSS) — whatever the project actually needs. The result is fast, secure and works on all devices.

launch.label: Launch & care
launch.title: Live without the hassle
launch.desc: I handle hosting, SSL, domain, backups and uptime monitoring. After launch I'm still around — updates, content changes, technical support. Nothing falls on your lap.

featured.desc: A comprehensive financial advisory project I co-founded. Insurance, investments, savings, mortgages — all under one roof. I built the entire website, handle hosting, security and manage Instagram marketing.
featured.mockup_desc: Comprehensive financial advisory under one roof.

webdesign.cta_desc: Write to me, explain what you need and we'll figure it out. No commitment, no pressure.

contact.seo_title: Contact | Vojtěch Adam — web design and photography Prague
contact.seo_desc: Contact Vojtěch Adam — request a website, commissioned photography or collaboration. Send an email or use the contact form.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Write to me — whether it's about a project, collaboration, or just to say hi.
contact.form_success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Try again or write directly to my email.
contact.error_network: Network error. Please try again or email directly.
contact.ts_hint: Complete the verification above before sending.

footer.brand_desc: Web developer & photographer, originally from Opava, now in Prague.
